title: HTML Basics Mock Test
description: Test your knowledge of HTML fundamentals

questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
questions.explanation: HTML stands for Hyper Text Markup Language. It is the standard markup language for creating web pages.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a hyperlink in HTML?
questions.explanation: The <a> (anchor) tag is used to create hyperlinks. The href attribute specifies the destination URL.

questions.question: Which attribute is used to specify the image source in the tag?
questions.explanation: The src (source) attribute specifies the path to the image file in the tag.

questions.question: What is the correct HTML element for inserting a line break?
questions.explanation:
The
tag inserts a single line break. It is an empty element with no closing tag.

questions.question: Which HTML attribute is used to define inline styles?
questions.explanation: The style attribute is used to add inline CSS styles directly to an HTML element.
